name: Trio Petroleum Corp
business: Trio Petroleum Corp is a California-based oil and gas exploration and development company that generates revenue from oil sales. Its operations include producing wells in Saskatchewan, Canada, and exploratory projects in California and Utah.

exposures.sentence: We are a California-based oil and gas exploration and development company headquartered in Malibu, California, with our principal executive offices located at 23823 Malibu Road, Suite 304, Malibu, California 90265, with operations in Monterey County, California, Uintah County, Utah and Lloydminster, Saskatchewan.
We are taking initial steps to launch a Carbon Capture and Storage ( CCS ) project as part of the South Salinas Project, which appears ideal for such a task.

catalysts.event: Achieve minimum sustained production rate of 40 barrels per day for continuous 30-day period from two wells at Asphalt Ridge to exercise option on P.R. Spring
catalysts.sentence: The LOI requires evidence of a minimum sustained production rate of 40 barrels per day for a continuous 30-day period from two wells at Asphalt Ridge by May 15, 2026, or the LOI will expire unless extended by us.

tamClaims.claim: The economic output of the oil industry in Monterey County is an estimated $644 million per year.
tamClaims.sentence: The economic output of the oil industry in Monterey County is an estimated $644 million per year.
